name: even-publisher
tagline: Draft and publish AI-powered WordPress posts from G2 glasses
description: Even Publisher lets you start new AI-assisted researches from your G2 glasses, iterate on drafts via voice prompts, mark them ready for publishing, and schedule WordPress posts using settings provided on the phone screen.
author: Ivan Vlaevski

permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: Uses OpenAI, ElevenLabs and WordPress APIs.

permissions.name: g2-microphone
permissions.desc: Required for G2 glasses microphone: bridge.audioControl and PCM audioEvent (16 kHz mono) for speech-to-text. See docs/guides/device-apis.
